textByHash.176e66f7544073bfba9a77ac83c935d8ba91b0ba: I know more about the realm of the Grail than many, and I have a feeling you may need to come back and speak to me anyway...
textByHash.1c317fcaf8cec2a22a214ce10873ad94bebdad3d: Welcome to my home. It's rare for me to have guests! Would you like a cup of tea? I'll just put the kettle on.
textByHash.35585bac262994434c5b5063e87de31e6cf242bf: If you do come across any particularily difficult obstacles on your quest, do not hesitate to ask my advice.
textByHash.4427a7a86530c18c4850f21a887e3344e83bf00f: ...I'm not sure. Because... it seemed to be... NEEDED in the Grail castle? Half a moment, your cup of tea is ready.
textByHash.6ea758368b8c82b515313b8a54d7b742404637cb: Ah... the Grail... yes... that did fill me with wonder! Oh, that I could have stayed forever! The spear, the food, the people...
textByHash.70c43f6e36def031f5ba8152ea0f28701635fa09: The Grail castle... It's... hard to describe with words. It mostly felt like a dream!
textByHash.87ed3a43d5eddc6ec973dddaa7c9697f3b7c997e: Funny you should mention that, but when I left there I took this small cloth from the table as a keepsake.
textByHash.8c3fb36b8b2abcbebdd021803901eae2ced255b2: Half a moment, your cup of tea is ready.
textByHash.9840fd262d192c0a7c9770f01e1633ff58027f27: Leaving was tough for me, so I took this small cloth from the table as a keepsake.
textByHash.9da4066caece2968531451f70515f6b3558693cb: Sometimes I do, yes. Still not many people to share my solidarity with, as most of the religious men around here are worshippers of Saradomin. Half a moment, your cup of tea is ready.
textByHash.cf68f281592b6549dca64d1df61a16dec398843b: I did not find it through looking - though admittedly I looked long and hard - eventually, it found me.
textByHash.d2f34c5d5cf794fbe13354e8a765f53d49a09504: Although I've retired as a Knight, and now live as a solitary monk. Also, I prefer to be known as brother rather than sir now. Half a moment, your cup of tea is ready.
textByHash.df50abb60dfaf2cbf7cb86b0e552c3c0bd085837: Apparently the time is getting close when the world will need Arthur and his knights of the round table again.
